hero.name: Nick MEGANIS
hero.description: I build things for the web and explore ideas at the intersection of technology and science.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Developer & Researcher
bio: I'm a software developer and student passionate about building impactful applications and contributing to scientific research. With a strong foundation in computer science, I enjoy solving complex problems with elegant solutions.
When I'm not writing code, I'm diving into research papers, experimenting with new technologies, or working on my academic projects. I believe in the power of technology to change the world.

items.title: Project Alpha
items.description: A full-stack web application that solves a real-world problem. Built with React and a Python backend, featuring real-time data processing and an intuitive UI.

items.title: Project Beta
items.description: A machine learning pipeline for data analysis and prediction. Includes data preprocessing, model training, and a visualization dashboard.

items.title: Project Gamma
items.description: An open-source CLI tool that automates repetitive development tasks. Supports multiple platforms and has 100+ GitHub stars.

items.title: Title of Your Research Paper or Thesis
items.venue: International Journal of Computer Science / Conference Name
items.description: Brief abstract or description of the research. What problem was addressed, what method was used, what was the key finding.

items.title: Another Research Work: Study of Something Interesting
items.venue: Workshop on Advanced Topics, University Name
items.description: Course or independent research project exploring a specific scientific or engineering topic with experimental evaluation.

items.title: Bachelor's / Master's Thesis Title
items.description: Thesis investigating a particular domain. Includes literature review, methodology, experiments, and conclusions.
Specialization in machine learning and distributed systems. GPA: X.X/5.0
Core curriculum in algorithms, data structures, OS, databases, and software engineering. Graduated with honors.

items.title: Getting Started with FastAPI and PostgreSQL
items.description: A practical guide to building a production-ready REST API with FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, and PostgreSQL — from setup to deployment.

items.title: Understanding Attention Mechanisms in Transformers
items.description: A deep dive into how self-attention works, with visualizations and code examples in PyTorch.

items.title: Clean Architecture in Python Projects
items.description: How to structure Python projects for maintainability and testability using clean architecture principles.

contact.title: Contact
